steps.title: Find the width from the length
steps.content: The house’s base length is x inches. It is 1 inch more than the width, so width = x - 1 inches.

steps.title: Compute the volume using the prism formula
steps.content:
$$V = 11 \cdot x \cdot (x - 1) = 11x(x - 1)$$
That matches choice A — A is correct.
